objective: Promote the sandbox-complete UI-002g variance surface toward a truthful host disposition by wiring VarianceReviewView into the existing PM shell with the smallest coherent index.html change, running the variance route and UI end to end against a populated apex_pm_stage host session, capturing real browser evidence for representative slipping and no-baseline cases, and fixing only the smallest runtime defects required to achieve that host proof without broadening into schedule writes, shell redesign, or unrelated driver and tracer integration work.
active_role: PM UI Variance Host Validation Architect

constrained_outputs: One minimal PM shell wiring change in apps/pm-surface/public/index.html that mounts VarianceReviewView against the existing host shell without broad redesign

One real host-browser validation pass covering representative slipping, on-plan or ahead, and no-baseline variance cases plus the with_baseline_only, only_slipping, and sort or null-rendering behaviors

validation_steps: Confirm VarianceReviewView is mounted into apps/pm-surface/public/index.html with the smallest coherent shell change needed for host execution

Confirm host-side browser validation exercises representative slipping, on-plan or ahead, and no-baseline variance rows against a populated apex_pm_stage session and proves the with_baseline_only, only_slipping, and sort or null-rendering paths
Confirm no non-GET variance traffic, schedule-write behavior, transform-builder mutation, or broader shell redesign is introduced
Capture screenshot or equivalent browser evidence and close truthfully as host-validated or blocked with the exact host blocker named
sql_permission_note: Packet UI-002g-host authorizes only bounded host wiring, read-only browser validation, and the smallest runtime fixes required to validate the existing variance surface. No new SQL, no schedule-write behavior, no transform-builder mutation, and no broad PM shell redesign are authorized.
